response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with direct matches on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), plus current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly aligns with the role's AI agent development requirement. Strong engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with 6+ years of relevant experience
Current AI-agent and MCP development experience aligns with a key requirement
Strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD) and proven full-stack breadth
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles (mostly DLang for non-JS backend)
No explicit cloud certification or deep Kubernetes ownership called out beyond AWS CDK
